corrections.text: The article states 'For Kotlin/Native specifically, a rewrite of coroutine lock handling in R8 delivered up to 50% savings on composed performance benchmarks.' The JetBrains keynote blog identifies R8 as 'Android's whole-program optimization tool' — this is a Google/Android optimization, not a Kotlin/Native-specific one. The correct context is that it is an Android build-chain improvement announced during the Kotlin at Google section of the keynote.

The article quotes 'doubled over past year' (in quotation marks) regarding Kotlin Multiplatform adoption. The keynote source text reads 'more than doubling over the past year'. The article's phrasing drops 'more than', weakening the actual statistic reported by JetBrains.
